purpose: Example host composition for an ocean island landform with a water plane and mattatz cloud suite descriptors.
hostResponsibilities: Build terrain mesh from island render contract heightfield samples.
Render water plane externally at island seaLevel.
Use island waterInterface shoreline/foam descriptors to place shore foam and wave break masks.
Map island object descriptors to renderer-side assets or placeholders.
Map mattatz cloud descriptors to volumetric boxes, impostors, or horizon cloud bands.
Keep camera, controls, DOM, Canvas, Three.js, and asset loading in the experiment host.
